name: Tabs
description: Tab container with Alpine.js switching, supporting underline, pills, boxed, and vertical variants with URL hash sync.

defaultTab.description: Name of the initially active tab

variant.description: Visual variant for the tab layout

hashSync.description: Sync active tab with URL hash for bookmarkable tabs

underline.description: Border-bottom tab indicators — use for page-level tabs

pills.description: Rounded pill tab buttons — use for card-level or compact tabs

boxed.description: Segmented control style — use for compact toggles within a card

vertical.description: Side navigation tabs — use for settings pages and long option lists

decision_rule: Use to organize related content into switchable panels. Prefer tabs over accordions for 2-5 sections of equal importance. Use underline for page-level, pills for card-level, boxed for toggles, vertical for settings.

filament_equivalent.note: In Filament forms/infolists, use Filament's Tabs component
